---
title: "Florence Gertrude Norsworthy"
---

## Florence Gertrude Norsworthy

**Dates:** (b. 1853)

**Maiden name:** (Bigg Wither)

### Description

niece of the Rev. William Bigg Wither

### Biography

Seventh daughter of Harris Jervoise Bigg Wither (1806-1887) (who had proposed to Jane Austen), she was wife of George Norsworthy and niece of the Rev. W.H.W. Bigg Wither.  [Rev. Reginald Bigg-Wither, <i>Materials for a History of the Wither Family</i> (Winchester: Warren & Son 1907)]

### Letters

- Letter from [<i>c</i>.  1900]
- [To Marianne Bigg Wither, March 17 [1899]](../letters/3399_To_Marianne_Bigg_Wither.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
